scripts.pack:verify: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('.artifacts/packs',{ recursive: true, force: true }); require('fs').mkdirSync('.artifacts/packs',{ recursive: true });" && npm pack --workspace @cmd-kit/core --pack-destination .artifacts/packs && npm pack --workspace @cmd-kit/react --pack-destination .artifacts/packs && npm pack --workspace @cmd-kit/vue --pack-destination .artifacts/packs
scripts.release:check: npm run test && npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm run pack:verify
scripts.release:npm: npm publish --workspace @cmd-kit/core && npm publish --workspace @cmd-kit/react && npm publish --workspace @cmd-kit/vue
